banners.name: Moha · Delusion
banners.def: False perception of reality keeps the soul bound in karma.

banners.name: Tyaga · Renunciation
banners.def: Voluntarily releasing worldly attachments leads to spiritual freedom.

banners.name: Dukha · Suffering
banners.def: Suffering arises from identifying with the perishable body and desires.

banners.name: Tapa · Austerity
banners.def: Deliberate practice that weakens karma and strengthens the soul.

banners.name: Samsara · Worldly Existence
banners.def: Involvement in worldly activities generates binding karma.

banners.name: Prajna · Wisdom
banners.def: Direct insight into reality transcends mere intellectual knowledge.

banners.name: Krodha · Anger
banners.def: Anger destroys equanimity and generates the most intense karma.

banners.name: Lobha · Greed
banners.def: Craving for possessions generates binding karma without ceasing.

banners.name: Samsara · Worldly Existence
banners.def: Involvement in worldly activities generates binding karma.

banners.name: Vinaya · Discipline
banners.def: Self-imposed order of thought, word, and deed transforms the soul.

banners.name: Lobha · Greed
banners.def: Craving for possessions generates binding karma without ceasing.

banners.name: Moksha · Liberation
banners.def: Freedom from karma and rebirth is the soul's eternal home.
